speaker: IMOGEN
text: I see a man’s life is a tedious one.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I have tired myself, and for two nights together

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Have made the ground my bed. I should be sick

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But that my resolution helps me. Milford,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When from the mountain top Pisanio showed thee,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thou wast within a ken. O Jove, I think

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Foundations fly the wretched—such, I mean,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Where they should be relieved. Two beggars told me

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I could not miss my way. Will poor folks lie,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That have afflictions on them, knowing ’tis

speaker: IMOGEN
text: A punishment or trial? Yes. No wonder,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: When rich ones scarce tell true. To lapse in fullness

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is sorer than to lie for need, and falsehood

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is worse in kings than beggars. My dear lord,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thou art one o’ th’ false ones. Now I think on thee,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: My hunger’s gone; but even before, I was

speaker: IMOGEN
text: At point to sink for food. But what is this?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Here is a path to ’t. ’Tis some savage hold.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I were best not call; I dare not call. Yet famine,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Ere clean it o’erthrow nature, makes it valiant.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Plenty and peace breeds cowards; hardness ever

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Of hardiness is mother.—Ho! Who’s here?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: If anything that’s civil, speak; if savage,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Take or lend. Ho!—No answer? Then I’ll enter.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Best draw my sword; an if mine enemy

speaker: IMOGEN
text: But fear the sword like me, he’ll scarcely look on ’t.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Such a foe, good heavens!

speaker: BELARIUS
text: You, Polydor, have proved best woodman and

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Are master of the feast. Cadwal and I

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Will play the cook and servant; ’tis our match.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: The sweat of industry would dry and die

speaker: BELARIUS
text: But for the end it works to. Come, our stomachs

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Will make what’s homely savory. Weariness

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Can snore upon the flint when resty sloth

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Finds the down pillow hard. Now peace be here,

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Poor house, that keep’st thyself.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: I am throughly weary.

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: I am weak with toil, yet strong in appetite.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: There is cold meat i’ th’ cave. We’ll browse on that

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Whilst what we have killed be cooked.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Stay, come not in!

speaker: BELARIUS
text: But that it eats our victuals, I should think

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Here were a fairy.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: What’s the matter, sir?

speaker: BELARIUS
text: By Jupiter, an angel! Or, if not,

speaker: BELARIUS
text: An earthly paragon. Behold divineness

speaker: BELARIUS
text: No elder than a boy.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Good masters, harm me not.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Before I entered here, I called, and thought

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To have begged or bought what I have took. Good troth,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I have stol’n naught, nor would not, though I had found

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Gold strewed i’ th’ floor. Here’s money for my meat.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I would have left it on the board so soon

speaker: IMOGEN
text: As I had made my meal, and parted

speaker: IMOGEN
text: With prayers for the provider.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Money, youth?

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: All gold and silver rather turn to dirt,

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: As ’tis no better reckoned but of those

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: Who worship dirty gods.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I see you’re angry.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Know, if you kill me for my fault, I should

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Have died had I not made it.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Whither bound?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To Milford Haven.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: What’s your name?

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Fidele, sir. I have a kinsman who

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Is bound for Italy. He embarked at Milford,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To whom being going, almost spent with hunger,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I am fall’n in this offense.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Prithee, fair youth,

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Think us no churls, nor measure our good minds

speaker: BELARIUS
text: By this rude place we live in. Well encountered!

speaker: BELARIUS
text: ’Tis almost night; you shall have better cheer

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Ere you depart, and thanks to stay and eat it.—

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Boys, bid him welcome.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Were you a woman, youth,

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: I should woo hard but be your groom in honesty,

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Ay, bid for you as I do buy.

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: I’ll make ’t my comfort

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: He is a man. I’ll love him as my brother.—

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: And such a welcome as I’d give to him

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: After long absence, such is yours. Most welcome.

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: Be sprightly, for you fall ’mongst friends.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: ’Mongst friends?

speaker: IMOGEN
text:
If brothers—
                (
                aside
                )
                 
              Would it had been so, that they

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Had been my father’s sons! Then had my prize

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Been less, and so more equal ballasting

speaker: IMOGEN
text: To thee, Posthumus.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: He wrings at some distress.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Would I could free ’t!

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: Or I, whate’er it be,

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: What pain it cost, what danger. Gods!

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Hark, boys.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Great men

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That had a court no bigger than this cave,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That did attend themselves and had the virtue

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Which their own conscience sealed them, laying by

speaker: IMOGEN
text: That nothing-gift of differing multitudes,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Could not outpeer these twain. Pardon me, gods!

speaker: IMOGEN
text: I’d change my sex to be companion with them,

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Since Leonatus false.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: It shall be so.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Boys, we’ll go dress our hunt.—Fair youth, come in.

speaker: BELARIUS
text: Discourse is heavy, fasting. When we have supped,

speaker: BELARIUS
text: We’ll mannerly demand thee of thy story

speaker: BELARIUS
text: So far as thou wilt speak it.

speaker: GUIDERIUS
text: Pray, draw near.

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: The night to th’ owl and morn to th’ lark less welcome.

speaker: IMOGEN
text: Thanks, sir.

speaker: ARVIRAGUS
text: I pray, draw near.
